expected_effect: Improve breakout odds by recentering later during toxic continuation and earlier during benign passive flow, without changing the quote-map topology.
expected_failure_signature: If the alpha state lags or overreacts, arb leakage returns or the strategy recenters too slowly and overprices calm flow.
expected_win_condition: Improve overall edge by holding protective posture through toxic drift while preserving calm-slice performance.
hidden_coupling_removed: Short-horizon spot jumps should not decide both fair-mid recentering speed and toxic continuation state.
rationale: Add a slower signed-flow alpha to the fair-mid estimate so persistent toxic drift is separated from transient spot jumps before quote assembly reacts.
title: Flow alpha fair mid with toxic recenter veto
why_not_coefficient_retune: This adds a new fair-mid state with its own decay and veto logic instead of only changing spread weights.
